mnemonics: ADAptive GRADient: Adapts the learning rate for each parameter based on the sum of past squared gradients.
keyPoints: Adapts learning rates individually for each parameter.
Uses cumulative sum of squared gradients to scale the learning rate.
Well-suited for sparse data and natural language processing tasks.
commonMistakes: Using it for non-sparse or dense data problems where other optimizers perform better.
Letting the learning rate become too small too quickly, causing learning to stop prematurely.
Applying it to problems with very large gradients, which can cause the effective learning rate to vanish.
